ddl.value: "post_link"."image_alt" IS NULL OR "post_link"."image_url" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: post_link_image_alt_check

ddl.value:
CASE
          WHEN "post_link"."image_type" IS NULL THEN true
          ELSE "post_link"."image_type" ~ '^image/' AND
               "post_link"."image_url" IS NOT NULL
        END
ddl.name: post_link_image_type_check

ddl.value:
CASE
          WHEN "post_link"."image_width" IS NOT NULL
          THEN "post_link"."image_url" IS NOT NULL AND
                 "post_link"."image_height" IS NOT NULL AND
                 "post_link"."image_width" > 0 AND
                 "post_link"."image_height" > 0
          WHEN "post_link"."image_height" IS NOT NULL
          THEN "post_link"."image_url" IS NOT NULL AND
               "post_link"."image_width" IS NOT NULL AND
               "post_link"."image_width" > 0 AND
               "post_link"."image_height" > 0
          ELSE true
        END
ddl.name: post_link_image_width_height_check

ddl.value:
CASE
          WHEN "post_medium"."width" IS NULL THEN "post_medium"."height" IS NULL
          ELSE "post_medium"."height" IS NOT NULL AND
               "post_medium"."width" > 0 AND "post_medium"."height" > 0
        END
ddl.name: post_medium_width_height_check
